metadata.title: Torre Medica La Carolina | Machala
metadata.description: Medical specialists directory in Machala, Ecuador. Book via WhatsApp.

nav.announcementAddress: Circunvalacion Norte and Marcel Laniado, Machala

hero.title: Medical specialists, all in one place
hero.description: Book your appointment directly via WhatsApp, with no middlemen and no waiting. Torre Medica La Carolina brings together leading specialists in Machala.

howto.title: Booking is this simple
howto.step1Desc: Browse the directory and find the professional you need.
howto.step2Desc: Contact the office directly with a single tap.
howto.step3Desc: The doctor's team confirms your available date and time.

home.howtoSubtitle: Three simple steps to connect with the right specialist.
home.facilitiesDescription: Two full medical towers with contemporary infrastructure in the heart of Machala.
home.feature1Desc: Private offices and advanced diagnostic laboratories distributed across multiple floors.
home.feature2Desc: Spaces for procedures, diagnostic support, and specialized care with an integrated approach.
home.feature3Desc: Coordinated care, continuous security, and round-the-clock access to the complex.
home.ctaDescription: More than 50 qualified specialists across two next-generation towers, ready to care for you.

specialties.title: Featured specialties
specialties.description: A quick look at the medical areas available in the tower.

doctors.title: Doctor directory
doctors.description: Each card includes a direct WhatsApp action for booking or initial contact.
doctors.emptyState: There are no specialists in this category.

towers.title: Our buildings
towers.subtitle: Two towers inside one medical complex
towers.mapDescription: Google Maps lists Torre Medica La Carolina as a single public place. From that listing, visitors access Tower I and Tower II.
towers.reviewsDescription: Review highlights shown on the public Google Maps listing for Torre Medica La Carolina.

reviewQuotes.review-3: You can find good specialists here.

torre-1.locationNote: It appears together with Tower II under a single Google Maps listing.

torre-2.locationNote: It shares the same public complex listing on Google Maps.

footer.description: A center of medical excellence in the heart of Machala, Ecuador.
footer.address: Circunvalacion Norte and Marcel Laniado, Machala, Ecuador

profile.contactDesc: Schedule your visit directly with the doctor's office.

search.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your search terms or filters.
search.notFoundTitle: Didn't find who you're looking for?
search.notFoundDesc: Our center has over 50 specialists. Contact us and we'll help you find the right provider.
